# Tailor Studio

> A free, native macOS application for visually building OctoberCMS Tailor
> blueprints. It replaces hand-written YAML with a three-panel visual editor and
> generates valid OctoberCMS Tailor blueprint YAML in real time.

Tailor Studio is open source (MIT) and built with Tauri 2, Vue 3, TypeScript and
Monaco Editor. It is NOT a plugin builder — it focuses exclusively on Tailor
content blueprints, complementing the official OctoberCMS Builder plugin.

## Key facts

- Platform: macOS (native desktop app)
- Price: Free and open source (MIT license)
- Purpose: Visually design OctoberCMS Tailor blueprints and export Tailor YAML
- Download: https://github.com/kristianvalco/tailor-studio/releases/latest
- Source: https://github.com/kristianvalco/tailor-studio
- Homepage: https://kristianvalco.github.io/tailor-studio/

## Features

- Visual blueprint editor (handle, name, type: Single/Structure/Stream/Global, navigation label & icon)
- 17 field types: Text, Textarea, Markdown, Rich Editor, Number, Date, Switch, Checkbox, Dropdown, Color Picker, Media Finder, File Upload, Code Editor, Repeater, Entries, Section, Partial
- Drag & drop field ordering
- Repeater builder with unlimited nesting and breadcrumb navigation
- Entries relation builder (source blueprint, relation type, display mode, max items)
- Live, editable YAML via Monaco editor (two-way: UI ↔ YAML)
- Approximate OctoberCMS backend form preview
- Multiple projects with local autosave
- Import, copy, export YAML and save project snapshots

## Who it is for

OctoberCMS developers and agencies who build Tailor-based content models and want
a fast, visual alternative to writing blueprint YAML files by hand.
